name: zillit-global-rates-bible
description: Zillit Global Production Rates Bible — React/TypeScript/Tailwind implementation

notes.fonts: Add Syne, DM Sans, DM Mono via next/font/google in app/layout.tsx
notes.data: Run npm run extract-data to generate src/data/ratesData.ts from the HTML prototype
notes.ai: The Anthropic API key is handled by the claude.ai environment. For standalone deployment, add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to .env.local and create an API route at app/api/chat/route.ts
notes.tailwind: The tailwind.config.ts in this kit maps all CSS custom properties from the HTML prototype to Tailwind tokens
